revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: ''''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては'''だいお...'
revision.text:
'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''と書くこともあり、'''大陰神'''とも書く。八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]の后とされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]とされる。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬するとされ、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶であるとされる。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉であるという。
==太陰神の在位== 夫とされる太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後の方角に在位する。 *その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 **子→戌 **丑→亥 **寅→子 **卯→丑 **辰→寅 **巳→卯 **午→辰 **未→巳 **申→午 **酉→未 **戌→申 **亥→酉
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

revision.comment: /* 太陰神の在位 */
revision.text:
'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''と書くこともあり、'''大陰神'''とも書く。八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]の后とされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]とされる。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬するとされ、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶であるとされる。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉であるという。
==太陰神の在位== 夫とされる太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後の方角に在位する。 *その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 **子→卯 **丑→辰 **寅→巳 **卯→午 **辰→未 **巳→申 **午→酉 **未→戌 **申→亥 **酉→子 **戌→丑 **亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{stub}}

revision.comment: /* 関連項目 */
revision.text:
'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''と書くこともあり、'''大陰神'''とも書く。八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]の后とされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]とされる。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬するとされ、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶であるとされる。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉であるという。
==太陰神の在位== 夫とされる太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後の方角に在位する。 *その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 **子→卯 **丑→辰 **寅→巳 **卯→午 **辰→未 **巳→申 **午→酉 **未→戌 **申→亥 **酉→子 **戌→丑 **亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8人の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）のひとり。暦本によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''と書くこともあり、'''大陰神'''とも書く。八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]の后とされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]とされる。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬するとされ、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶であるとされる。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉であるという。
==太陰神の在位== 夫とされる太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後の方角に在位する。 *その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 **子→卯 **丑→辰 **寅→巳 **卯→午 **辰→未 **巳→申 **午→酉 **未→戌 **申→亥 **酉→子 **戌→丑 **亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:土星神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]における8柱の[[方位神]]（[[八将神]]）の1つ。[[十二天将]]の1つでもある。暦本によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''と書くこともあり、'''大陰'''・'''大陰神'''とも書く。太陰と書くこともあるが、[[月]]を意味する太陰とは別である。
八将神の一人である[[太歳神]]（[[木星]]）の后とされ、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]とされる。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精とされ、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬するとされ、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶であるとされる。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉であるという。
==太陰神の在位== 夫とされる太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後の方角に在位する。
その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 *子→卯 *丑→辰 *寅→巳 *卯→午 *辰→未 *巳→申 *午→酉 *未→戌 *申→亥 *酉→子 *戌→丑 *亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:土星神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]の[[方位神]][[八将神]]の1柱である。また、[[十二天将]]の1柱でもある。[[暦本]]によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''とも。そのほか、'''大陰'''、'''大陰神'''、'''太陰'''とも書き、たいいん、だいおんとも読む。ただし、[[月]]を意味する太陰（たいいん）とは別である。
八将神の1柱である[[太歳神]]（[[木星]]）の后で、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]である。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精で、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬し、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶である。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉である。
==太陰神の在位== 夫の太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後（太歳神に向かってまっすぐ右）の方角に在位する。
その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 *子→卯 *丑→辰 *寅→巳 *卯→午 *辰→未 *巳→申 *午→酉 *未→戌 *申→亥 *酉→子 *戌→丑 *亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:土星神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

'''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]の[[方位神]][[八将神]]の1柱である。また、[[十二天将]]の1柱でもある。[[暦本]]によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''とも。そのほか、'''大陰'''、'''大陰神'''、'''太陰'''とも書き、たいいん、だいおんとも読む。ただし、[[月]]を意味する太陰（たいいん）とは別である。
八将神の1柱である[[太歳神]]（[[木星]]）の[[后]]で、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]である。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精で、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬し、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶である。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉である。
==太陰神の在位== 夫の太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後（太歳神に向かってまっすぐ右）の方角に在位する。
その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 *子→卯 *丑→辰 *寅→巳 *卯→午 *辰→未 *巳→申 *午→酉 *未→戌 *申→亥 *酉→子 *戌→丑 *亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:土星神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

revision.comment: [[Category:女神]]を除去 ([[WP:HotCat|HotCat]]使用)
revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|太陰神]] '''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]の[[方位神]][[八将神]]の1柱である。また、[[十二天将]]の1柱でもある。[[暦本]]によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''とも。そのほか、'''大陰'''、'''大陰神'''、'''太陰'''とも書き、たいいん、だいおんとも読む。ただし、[[月]]を意味する太陰（たいいん）とは別である。
八将神の1柱である[[太歳神]]（[[木星]]）の[[后]]で、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]である。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精で、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬し、太陰神の在位する[[方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶である。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉である。
==太陰神の在位== 夫の太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後（太歳神に向かってまっすぐ右）の方角に在位する。
その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 *子→卯 *丑→辰 *寅→巳 *卯→午 *辰→未 *巳→申 *午→酉 *未→戌 *申→亥 *酉→子 *戌→丑 *亥→寅
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の女神]] [[Category:土星神]] {{Japan-culture-stub}}

In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However,..."
revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}
[[Category:Deities in Onmyōdō]] [[Category:Saturn deities]] {{Japan-culture-stub}} [[ja:太陰神]]

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)

Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Subst:MAINSPACE]] to [[Category:q-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-q]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)
== See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神}}

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)
== See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}}

Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)== See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉)== See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}}

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}}

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities}}

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|ja|陰陽道|12=draft}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=draft}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|ja|月|12=draft}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisai Shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisai Shin|12=draft}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|ja|木星|12=draft}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|ja|仏教|12=draft}}, her {{ill|honji|ja|本地仏|12=draft}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音菩薩|12=draft}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|ja|土星|12=draft}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|土|12=draft}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|learning|ja|学問|12=draft}} and {{ill|arts|ja|芸術|12=draft}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisai Shin.
Yearly {{ill|Chinese zodiac|ja|十二支|12=draft}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=draft}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=draft}} <!--Taiyinjin-->

revision.text:
[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|太陰神]] '''太陰神'''（たいおんじん）とは、[[陰陽道]]の[[方位神]][[八将神]]の1柱である。また、[[十二天将]]の1柱でもある。[[暦本]]によっては'''だいおん'''、'''太おん'''とも。そのほか、'''大陰'''、'''大陰神'''、'''太陰'''とも書き、たいいん、だいおんとも読む。ただし、[[月]]を意味する太陰（たいいん）とは別である。
八将神の1柱である[[太歳神]]（[[木星]]）の[[后]]で、[[仏教]]における[[本地仏]]は[[聖観音菩薩]]である。
大陰神は、[[土星]]（鎮星）の精で、[[土]]（＝陰）の性格を持っているため、[[男性]]の[[陽]]に対し[[女性]]の[[陰]]の性質に嫉妬し、太陰神の在位する[[方位|方角]]に向かって女性に関すること（[[嫁]]取り、[[出産]]など）をすることは凶である。しかし、[[学問]]・[[芸術]]に関することは吉である。
==太陰神の在位== 夫の太歳神が在位する方角の3つ後（太歳神に向かってまっすぐ右）の方角に在位する。
その年の[[十二支]]の方位→太陰神の在位 *子→戌 *丑→亥 *寅→子 *卯→丑 *辰→寅 *巳→卯 *午→辰 *未→巳 *申→午 *酉→未 *戌→申 *亥→酉
==関連項目== *[[方位神]] *[[八将神]]
{{Japan-culture-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:たいおんしん}} [[Category:陰陽道の神]] [[Category:土星神]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.

As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.

As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.

Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in [[:en:Onmyōdō|Onmyōdō]] and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the [[:en:Moon|Moon]].
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰).
