Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with [[:en:Jupiter|Jupiter]]) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In [[:en:Buddhism|Buddhism]], her [[:en:Honji suijaku|Honji Buddha]] is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of [[:en:Saturn|Saturn]] (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to [[:en:Academic discipline|learning]] and [[:en:Art|arts]] are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly [[:en:Earthly Branches|Chinese zodiac]] direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:太陰神]][[zh:太陰神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q129820]] Wikidata name: Taionjin [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} [[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Moon}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, her {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|Academic discipline|en|Academic discipline|WD=Q11862829|lt=learning}} and {{ill|Art|en|Art|WD=Q735|lt=arts}} are deemed auspicious.

Yearly {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, her {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|Academic discipline|en|Academic discipline|WD=Q11862829|lt=learning}} and {{ill|Art|en|Art|WD=Q735|lt=arts}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Moon}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism}}, her {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|Academic discipline|en|Academic discipline|WD=Q11862829|lt=learning}} and {{ill|Art|en|Art|WD=Q735|lt=arts}} are deemed auspicious.

However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Moon|1=Moon}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter|1=Jupiter}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism|1=Buddhism}}, her {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha|1=Honji suijaku}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn|1=Saturn}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰). Her nature contrasts with the masculine quality of "陽," and she harbors jealousy toward activities related to feminine matters. Consequently, actions concerning women, such as marriages and childbirth, in the direction of her presence are considered inauspicious. However, endeavors related to {{ill|Academic discipline|en|Academic discipline|WD=Q11862829|lt=learning|1=Academic discipline}} and {{ill|Art|en|Art|WD=Q735|lt=arts|1=Art}} are deemed auspicious.
== Taion Shin's Position == Taion Shin is positioned three directions clockwise from her consort, Taisaijin.
Yearly {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Chinese zodiac|1=Earthly Branches}} direction → Taion Shin's position: * Rat (子) → Dog (戌) * Ox (丑) → Pig (亥) * Tiger (寅) → Rat (子) * Rabbit (卯) → Ox (丑) * Dragon (辰) → Tiger (寅) * Snake (巳) → Rabbit (卯) * Horse (午) → Dragon (辰) * Goat (未) → Snake (巳) * Monkey (申) → Horse (午) * Rooster (酉) → Goat (未) * Dog (戌) → Monkey (申) * Pig (亥) → Rooster (酉) == See Also == * {{ill|Guardian Deity of Directions|ja|方位神|1=Directional deity|1=Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guardian Deity of Directions|13=User:Immanuelle/Directional deity|qq=}} * {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}

[[File:God of Taion.png|thumb|right|170px|Taion Shin]] '''Taion Shin''' (太陰神, たいおんじん) is one of the {{ill|Eight Guardian Deities|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Guardian Deities|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}} in {{ill|Onmyōdō|en|Onmyōdō|WD=Q1340540|lt=Onmyōdō|1=Onmyōdō}} and also one of the {{ill|Twelve Heavenly Generals|ja|十二天将|1=Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|lt=Twelve Heavenly Generals|qq= (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals|13=User:Immanuelle/Twelve Heavenly Generals (Taoism)|qq=}}. In various calendar texts, it may also be written as "だいおん" or "太おん." Additionally, it may be referred to as "大陰," "大陰神," or "太陰," read as "たいいん" or "だいおん." However, it is distinct from the term "太陰" (tai'in), which refers to the {{ill|Moon|en|Moon|WD=Q405|lt=Moon|1=Moon}}.
Taion Shin is the consort of {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (the deity associated with {{ill|Jupiter|en|Jupiter|WD=Q319|lt=Jupiter|1=Jupiter}}) and represents one of the Eight Guardian Deities. In {{ill|Buddhism|en|Buddhism|WD=Q748|lt=Buddhism|1=Buddhism}}, her {{ill|Honji suijaku|en|Honji suijaku|WD=Q3080781|lt=Honji Buddha|1=Honji suijaku}} is {{ill|Shō Kannon Bosatsu|ja|聖観音|1=Āryāvalokiteśvara|2=ja|3=聖観音|lt=Shōkannon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shō Kannon Bosatsu|qq=}}.
As the spirit of {{ill|Saturn|en|Saturn|WD=Q193|lt=Saturn|1=Saturn}} (鎮星), Taion Shin embodies the element of {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (陰).
